title: AK-1A "Hammer"
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:AK-1AHammer.jpg]] |name=AK-1A
"Hammer" |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] |creator= |manufacturer= |line=[[CWW8 Battle Droid]] |model= |class=[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament=2 [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] *[[Missile launcher/Legends|Missile launchers]] |equipment= |affiliation=[[HK-47]] }} '''AK-1A "Hammer"''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] used by [[HK-47]] in his attempts to take over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. It was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and an arsenal of missiles. It was destroyed by a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who went on to defeat HK-47. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==External links== *{{SWGWiki}} [[Category:CWW8 Battle Droids]] [[Category:Members of HK-47's Droid Army]]
